'''Tran Mariel''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Tran Mariel system/Legends|Tran Mariel system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]<ref name="TEA-OC" /> and the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Runyip/Legends|Runyip]].<ref name="SpecForce" />

==History==
Tran Mariel was the location of a small apartment where the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] ran an underground [[Hologram/Legends|holo]] network. This tiny facility, staffed by just a few personnel, was regarded as fairly typical of a Rebel base.<ref name="SWS">''[[The Star Wars Sourcebook]]''</ref>
